title: Lungleiah Flying Squad te'n tuialhthei leh eirawng bawlna gas zawrhna hmunte an endik
content:
64/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 7:Lunglei District-a tuialhthei (Petroleum, Oil & Lubricants – POL) leh eirawng bawlna gas (Liquefied Petroleum Gas – LPG)-a harsatna a awm loh nana District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann kaihhruaina hnuaia hma lakna kal zelah vawiin khan Flying Squad chuan Lunglei khawpui chhunga tuialhthei zawrhna (filling station) leh gas agency te a hmunah kal chilhin an endik.

Flying Squad hi an Leader, Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Lalthlengliana'n hovin, member-te – SDPO Pu R. Lalthankima, Supply Inspector Pu Andrew Lalramṭana, Legal Metrology Inspector Pu Kawldingliana Colney leh DO (DM&R) Pi Chuaupari Pachuau te an thawk chhuak a. Jedaz Filling Station (Zotlang), K. Sianglinga Filling Station (Zohnuai), MIZOFED Filling Station (AOC), El Pee Gas Agency leh Southern Gas Service te tlawhin, tuialhthei leh gas chhek khawl sa dinhmun te, mipuite tana an pek chhuah dan te an endik a. POL leh LPG chhek khawl sa (stock) chu a ṭhahnem thawkhatin, a lo thlenna lamah pawh harsatna a awm lo tih hmuh a ni a. Mipuite hnenah tluang taka sem chhuah niin, chhek khawl sa bak pawh a lo thlen belh zel beisei a ni.

Gas Agency te chuan tun hnaia mipuite harsatna tawh tam ber chu online-a LPG book kawngah a nih thu sawiin, consumer-te'n missed call-na tur number-a an call hnuah Delivery Authentication Code (DAC) an dawn theih loh avang te, call a tlang theih loh avang te leh Gas Agency-te'n system-ah an lo khawih ve ngai a awm ṭhin avang te'n gas book tumte'n harsatna an tawk ṭhin tih an sawi a. Gas hi single connection-ah ni 25 hnuah, double connection-ah ni 35 hnuah leh BPL connection-ah ni 45 hnuah chauh book nawn theih a nih thu leh DAC tel lo chuan gas pek chhuah theih a nih loh thu sawiin, system/khawl lam chian loh avang hian agent leh mipuite'n harsatna an tawk ṭhin tih an sawi a. Gas book chungchanga harsatna nei leh DAC dawng thei lote chuan nghak ringawt lovin Gas Agency-te pan ṭhin se, a hmunah chin fel theih tam tak a awm tih an sawi.

Lunglei District-a POL leh LPG hnianghnar dan dinhmun leh a kaihhnawih harsatna hrang hrang vil turin Joint Control Room siam niin, Flying Squad din a ni bawk a. Anni hian POL leh LPG dinhmun chu ni tin an thlithlai reng a. District thuneitute chuan POL, LPG leh ni tin mamawh bungruate chheprelh lo tur te, a mantova zuar lo tur leh mipui tichi-ai thei zawnga thu dik lo theh darh lo tur te'n sumdawngte leh mipuite an ngen a. Hemi kaihhnawiha harsatna leh mamawh thlen duh nei chuan phone number 9862653478-ah hian Lunglei JCR/DEOC chu biak pawh theih reng a ni.

Attachment

title: AMC Inthlanpui, 2026 lo awm tura Polling Station leh Counting Hall-a mobile phone hman khap chungchang
content:
63/2026-2027

Aizawl, 7th April, 2026 :State Election Commission, Mizoram chuan ngunthluk taka a ngaihtuah hnuah Polling Officer-te, Candidate-te, Election agent-te, Polling agent-te leh Voter-te’n Aizawl Municipal Corporation Inthlanpui lo awm tura vote thlak ni (April ni 21, 2026) a vote thlakna hmun (polling station building) ah mobile phone ken luh hrim hrim a khap a. Presiding Officer-te erawh Poll Day Report an pek a ngaih avangin mobile phone silent mode a dahin an ken luh phalsak an ni.

Vote chhiar ni April ni 27, 2026 ah chuan vote chhiarna hmun (Counting Hall) ah) Election Observer-te, District Municipal Election Officer, Assistant District Municipal Election Officer, Municipal Returning Officer-te leh Asst. Municipal Returning Officer-te chauh mobile phone silent mode a dahin an ken luh phalsak an ni a.  Counting Hall luh dawnah security duty ten uluk takin an lo check thin ang.

title: Restriction on use of Mobile phone inside the Polling Station and Counting Hall in the GE to AMC Election, 2026
content:
11/2026-2027

Aizawl, 7th April, 2026 :The State Election Commission, Mizoram, taking all aspects into consideration, has ordered that the use of mobile phone by the Polling Officers, Candidates, Election agents, Polling agents, Voters etc., inside the polling station buildings shall not be allowed irrespective of whether it is kept in silent mode or otherwise in the General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026 scheduled to be held on 21st April, 2026. However, the Presiding Officers are allowed to carry mobile phone in silent mode in order to enable them to give Poll Day Report.

The Election Observers, District Municipal Election Officer, Assistant District Municipal Election Officer, Municipal Returning Officers and Asst. Municipal Returning Officers are allowed to carry mobile phone in silent mode inside the Counting Hall. Frisking shall be done at the Entry Point by security duty.

title: AMC Inthlanpui, 2026-a Voter Identity tih chianna atana document hamn theihte
content:
62/2026-2027

Aizawl the 7th April, 2026:Aizawl Municipality huam chhunga Ward 19-ah General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation, 2026 chu ni 21 April, 2026 (Thawhlehni) a neih turah hian vote inthlaksak emaw vote thlak nawn emaw a awm lohna’n State Election Commission chuan sub-rule (3) of Rule 53H of the Mizoram Municipalities (Election of Councillors) Rules, 2007-in thuneihna a pek angin voter zawng zawngte voter identity tih chian nan a hnuaia document eng emaw ber hi an hmang thei ang.

DOCUMENT HMAN THEIH TE

Heng document-te hmang Io a vote thlak tir an awma vote inthlaksak leh thil dik Io hmuh chhuah a nih chuan Presiding Officer leh Polling Officer-te’n mawh an phur ang.

61/2026-2027

title: Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan Champhaiah Heritage & Cultural Center, Eco Resort Experience at Keilungliah leh Construction of Artificial Turf lungphum a hawng
content:
60/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 7th March 2026:Sports & Youth Services leh Tourism Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan vawiin khan Thangtea Hall, Champhai Kahrawtah lungphun hawnna hun neiin lungphun pathum - Heritage & Cultural Center (Champhai Vengsang), Eco Resort Experience at Keilungliah leh Construction of Artificial Turf (New Champhai) lungphum te chu khuallian niin a hawng.

Khuallian Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan heng lungphun a hawng thei hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, sawrkar hmalakna a nih rualin sawrkar hi a puitu tur a ni a, a thawktu ber leh hlawkna teltu ber chu mipui an ni a, Community based tourism an kalpui zel duh thu a sawi. Heritage & Cultural Centre chuan meeting hmunhma tha tak a nei ang a, conference hman nan mi tam takin an hmang dawn tih a sawi a. Vantlang mipuite a enkawlna leh venhimna kawngah pui turin a sawm. Eco-Resort at Keilungliah pawh khualzin tam tak tan ei leh in leh riahna hmun tha tak a awm belh phah ang a, Champhaiah mi a hip belh ngei a beisei thu a sawi. Champhai mipuiin khualzin dawnsawn dan an thiam chhoh a ngai dawn hle a, theih ang anga inzir turin mipuite leh khawtlang hruaitute a fuih a ni. Champhaiah hian District Tourism Office hawn a ni dawn tih a puang a, Champhai Tourist Lodge siamthat tur thu a puang bawk.

Khuallian chuan Artificial Turf sak chungchang sawi chhunzawmin New Champhaia football field tha tak an nei thei tur hi a lawmpui thu a sawi a, inkhel hmuhnawm tak tak buatsaih a nih ngei a beisei thu sawiin Champhai District Football Association (CDFA) leh khawtlang mipui te'n tha taka enkawl turin a sawm a ni. Hetiang zat ni khata project hawn theih a ni hi Champhai tana ni chhinchhiah tlak a ni tih sawiin Champhai mipuite'n anmahni ta tur a ni tih hre reng turin a chah a ni.

He hun hi Tourism Director Pi R. Lalrodingi'n a kaihruai a, MTDA Executive Engineer Pi Esther Lalduhsaki'n Heritage and Cultural Center leh Eco Resort Experience at Keilungliah chungchang technical report pein Mizoram State Sports Council Secretary Pu Henry C. Lalrawnkima'n Construction of Artificial Turf chungchang technical report a pe a ni. Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan thu a sawi bawk.

Heritage & Cultural Center leh Eco Resort Experience at Keilungliah hi Tourism Department hmalakna niin Swadesh Darshan 2.0 hnuaia hmalakna a ni a, Eco Resort Experience-ah hian cottage te, naupang infiamna hmun te leh khualzin mamawh hrang hrang siam a ni dawn a, Heritage and Cultural Center-ah hian multipurpose hall te, lounge te, meeting room te siam a ni ang. Construction of Artificial Turf hi Ministry of Tribal Affairs hnuaia PMJVK scheme hmanga Sports & Youth Services hmalakna a ni a, inkhelhna mual tha tak siam a nih dawn bakah mipui thutna tur pavillion te, hungna te leh inthlakna leh inthiarna hmun tha tak tak siam tum a ni.

Attachment

title: RD&AD MINISTER-IN KHAWZAWL DPRC OFFICE LEH HOSTEL BUILDING HAWNNA HUN HMANPUI | VC-TE HNENAH COMPUTER HLANIN VC DANBU TLANGZARH NGHAL
content:
59/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 7th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Rural Development & Administration Department (RD&AD) Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Khawzawla District Panchayati Resource Centre office leh hostel building hawnna hun a hmanpuia, Khawzawl district chhunga Village Council hruaitu palite hnenah Computer hlanin, VC Danbu a tlangzarh nghal. He hun hi Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan a kaihruai a, RD&AD Addl. Secretary Pu V. Lalengmawia, LAD Director Dr. Lalngura Tlau, Project Director Pu K. Lalhmuakliana leh Khawzawl SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva te an tel a ni.

Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan thusawiin, VC-te thiamna leh theihna tihchakna tura training an neihna tur DPRC office leh hostel building tha tak hawn theiha a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. VC-te an inthawm chak theih nan leh khawtlang tan tha zawka hna an thawh theih nan VC Act thar, The Mizoram (Village Councils) Act, 2025 siam a nih thu a sawi bawk a. Minister chuan 15th Finance Commission hnuaia LAD tana fund kum thum chhung an dawn loh pawh kum khat chhungin an nawrchhuah tawh thu tarlangin, LAD, Directorate of Local Fund Audit leh PHE-te inkara thawhhona a that vang a ni, a ti a. 16th Finance Commission chuan VC-ten an mamawh inphuhruk thei tura mahnia sum an hailuh theih (own source of revenue) a ngaihpawimawh thu sawiin, VC hruaitute chu chutiang tura ngaihtuahna seng turin a chah a. National Panchayat Award 2025-a Clean & Green Panchayat category-a India ram pumah Kawrthah North Village Council chuan pakhatna a la chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Mizoram tungding tur chuan village council atanga bultan a ngaih thu sawiin, VC-te chu an hmazawn theuha theihtawp chhuah zel turin a fuih a. Vawiina hawn tak DPRC chu tangkai thei ang bera hmang turin duhsakanna hlanin, khawtlang leh Department hrang hrangte pawh phal taka hman tir turin a chah bawk a ni.

Hun kaihruatu Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Khawzawl district-in DPRC building leh hostel tha tak an nei ta chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Khawzawl mipuite chuan district-in hma a sawn zel theih nan sawrkarah rinna an nghah tlat thu a sawi a. LAD Executive Engineer Pu L.T. Lalrinmawia hnen atangin technical report nghaihthlak a ni a. LAD Director Dr. Lalngura Tlau chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.DPRC office building leh hostel building sakna tur hian Ministry of Panchayati Raj (MOPR)RGSA atangin nuiah 100 ve ve dawn a ni a. Tender chhuah niin, building pahnih sa turin Zothan Consultancy Service, Luangmual, Aizawl thlan an ni a. Office building-ah hian Conference room 1, Office room 3, Meeting hall 1 leh toilet 6 a awm a. Hostel building-ah hian room 6, choka 1 leh toilet 7 a awm bawk a. RGSA scheme hnuaiah VC engemaw zat hnenah computer hlan a ni tawh a, pekchhuah tur a la awm bawk a ni.Vawiin DPRC hawnna inkhawmah hian All Mizoram VC Association hruaitute, Khawzawl district chhunga VC hrang hrangte leh Khawzawl district chhunga Department hrang hrang Head of Office engemaw zat an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah chhim lam district palia sawrkar hna thawkte tan office inenkawlna leh sum vawn dan zir hona buatsaih a ni
content:
58/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 7:Vawiin khan Administrative Training Institute (ATI), Mizoram, Aizawl bul tumin ni hnih chhung awh tur, Mizoram chhim lam district pali – Lunglei, Siaha, Lawngtlai leh Hnahthial te tana office inenkawl dan leh sum vawn dan zir hona, "Special Training on Functional Efficiency in Establishment and Accounts Matters" chu BCM Hall, Serkawn, Lungleiah ṭan a ni.

April ni 7–8, 2026 chhunga training kalpui tur hawnna hun hi ATI Director Pi Rita Lalnunmawii Pachuau chuan kaihruaiin, hawnna thu a sawi a. ATI-in Lungleia kal chilha training a buatsaih chu Southern Zone District 4 huam chhunga sawrkar hna thawk, hmun hla zawka training kal harsatte tana ruahman a nih thu a sawi a. Hna zahawmna chu a thawktuin a hna a thiamnaah a innghat tih sawiin, sawrkar hna thawkte chu eng tik lai pawha inzir tur an nih thu leh inzir peih apiang chhawr tlak leh duhsak hlawh an nih ṭhin thu a sawi a. Training tura kal khawmte chu an hna thawhin mipui a nghawng tih leh mipui tana thawk an ni tih hria a, an hna thawh danah leh mipui an thawhpui danah ṭan la zel tur te, training chu hlawk tak leh a ṭangkai thei ang bera hman tum tur te'n a chah.

Training hawnna hun hi Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan hmanpuiin, sawrkar hna thawkte chu sawrkar ṭha siamna atana hmanraw pawimawh an nih thu leh ṭha taka hna thawk thei turin tun lai hmasawnna mila intah hriam reng a ṭul thu a sawi a. Sawrkar laipuiin iGOT Karmayogi kal tlangin sawrkar hna thawkte'n an thiamna an tihpun leh an tah hriam zelna tur ruahmanna a kalpui tih sawiin, chumi tihhlawhtlinna peng khat atana ATI-in sawrkar hna thawkte thiam tur pawimawh hrang hrang zir hona hun a buatsaih chu lawmawm a tih thu leh chhim lam district aṭanga training-a telte'n an hlawkpui ngei a beisei thu a sawi.

Course Director, ATI Deputy Director (Training) Pu Lalbiakenga chuan report pein, he training hi April ni 2–8, 2026 chhunga kalpui mek, SADHANA (Strengthening Adaptive Development and Humane Aptitude for National Advancement) Saptah – National Learning Week puala huaihawt a nih thu a sawi a. National Learning Week-in a tum ber chu sawrkar hna thawkte'n mahni hna ṭheuh leh mawhphurhnate thiam bel tak leh hnemhnanpuiawm zawka an thawh theih nana mahni hna leh ni tin khawsaknaa hman ṭangkai theih tur zir belh a nih thu a sawi.

Mizoram chhim lam district pali te tana Special Training buatsaih tur hian ATI Director Pi Rita Lalnunmawii Pachuau hovin ATI officer leh staff-te chuan nimin khan Lunglei thlengin, vawiin chawhma dar 10 aṭang khan training hi ṭan a ni a. Sawrkar hna thawkte'n ni tin office hna an thawhnaa an hman tur Rules ṭangkai tak tak – FRSR, CCS (CCA) Rules, Conduct Rules/Leave Rules, DPC Procedure, Service Book, Probation & Confirmation, Basic Accounts Matter, Dak & File Management, Pay & Allowances, NPS, Leave Rules leh Vacancy Based Roster-te bakah, soft skill lam subject – Ethics & Values, Problem-Solving & Decision-Making leh Mental Health chungchangte chu ni hnih chhungin ATI Officer/Faculty-te'n an zirtir dawn a ni.

He training-ah hian sawrkar hna thawk – Group A, Group B leh Group C te telin, Lunglei District aṭangin mi 80, Siaha District aṭangin mi 21, Lawngtlai District aṭangin mi 30 leh Hnahthial District aṭangin mi 25, an vaiin mi 156-in training hi an chhim a. ATI Director Pi Rita Lalnunmawii Pachuau, Joint Director (Training) Pi Lalrimawii Hmar, Deputy Director (Training) Pu Lalbiakenga, Deputy Director (Finance & Accounts) Pu F. Lalremmawia, Core Faculty Pi Golda Dell Zohmangaihi, Assistant Director Pu B. Tlangdingliana leh Assistant Director Pu Joseph Lalhmangaiaha te'n training hi an pe a. Zawhna leh chhanna leh sawi hona hun te hman ṭhin a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: NMBA LEH HRISELNA KUT - HEALTH CAMP CHUNGCHANG SAWI HO A NI
content:
57/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 7th April 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip district Deputy Commissioner Pu Paul L. Khuma kaihhruaiin, NMBA District Level Committee chuan Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan hnuaia hmalakna peng pakhat atan, ‘Hriselna Kut - Health Camp’ Serchhip-a huaihawt chungchang an sawi ho.

Chairman Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan ruihhlo dona kawnga Serchhip District hmalaknate sawiin, thalaite’n ruihhlo-in hriselna leh khawtlang nun a tih chhiat nasat theih dan te, hriselna ngaih pawimawh nachang an hriat a pawimawh thute a sawi a; inzirtirna uar lehzuala kalpui a nih theih nan leh thalai mai bakah mipui nawlpuiin an pan theih turin, Serchhip district-ah ‘Hriselna Kut – Healh Camp’ hi buatsaih tum a nih thu a sawi.

He Hriselna Kut-ah hian a duh apiangte’n a thlawna an hriselna dinhmun an entir theihna tur te; damdawi a thlawn emaw, man tlawm zawk emawa an hmuh theih dan tur te; District Hospital-a thawklaite bakah Serchhipa inentirna la awm ve rih lo, natna thenkhata thiam bikna nei daktawr chah chhuah an nih tur thu te; hmanhmawh thil thua damlo sawngbawl dan First-Aid Basic Training leh thih thut theihna pumpelh theih dan emergency response hrang hrang inzirtirna te; ei leh in leh nun danin a zir loh avanga natna hrang hrang awm thei chungchang inzirtirna te; ruihhloin hriselna a nghawng theih dan hrang hrangte he Kut-ah hian awm tura ruahman a nih thute a sawi bawk.

Hriselna Kut - Health Camp hi ruahman dan chuan kumin May thla chawhma lama neih hman tum niin Serchhip Deputy Commissioner Office tualzawlah neih tum a ni a, a tul anga hmalak zui nghal tura rel a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah vek hian Sub-Divisional Police Officer Pi Lalrinzuali’n ruihhlo dona tura Police Department-in ruahmanna Action Plan an siam chungchang sawi zauna a nei a, ngawrh lehzuala ruihhlo tawlhrukna chhuitu tur Special Investigation Team, sawrkar department bakah YMA leh Joint VC-te telna tur din tur chungchangte sawi ho a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ROAD SAFETY COMMITTEE LAWNGTLAI THUKHAWM
content:
56/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, the 7th April, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan Deputy Commissioner's Chamber, Lawngtlai-ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin Lawngtlai District Road Safety Committee thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member leh sawm bik kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Bawrhsap chuan Khawpui hmel lanna ber Faina leh Traffic Management- ah tan kan lak a ngai hle tiin LADC lam te nen thawk dunin mipuite an hrisel zawk nan leh kan him zawk nan tunthla tawp lamah Faina leh Traffic Management lama hmalakna lian tak hawn a nih a nih tur thu a sawi a. LADC- in Parking mumal leh felfai tak a awm theih nan a hmalakna an kalpui mek chu lawmwm a tih thu a tarlang bawk a ni. Bawrhsap chuan VC, NGO, YLA leh mipuite chu sawrkar thlawp leh thawhpui turin a sawm bawk a ni. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai khawpuia traffic leh Parking- a lo felfai a, faina leh thianghlimna kawngah rahbi thar kai turin chak taka hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian thil pawimawh leh hmalakna tur sawi ho niin Lawngtlai khawpui chhung kawng sir a insakna burua leh thildang dahte pawh mumal taka 'terms & conditions' siama, District Magistrate hnenah Permission dil nise, hemi chungchang ah hian thupek pawh chhuah nise tih rel a ni a. Road Protection Squad- ten thlakhatah vawi khat tal endikna neih thin nise tih a ni. EFCI Gowdown, Council Veng panna kawng chep tak chu LADC lam te nen a en ho a, hmalak dan tur thlirho nise tih a ni a. Bazar Veng leh Chandmary Square- a kawng sir a chawhmeh zuar kawng dunga thu thinte mumal zawka enkawl an nih theih nan ngenna LAD, LADC- ah committe- hmingin in thlen ni se an ti a. Chandmary Square - ah traffic - a tawt thin thin hle tih pawm tlangin, Traffic Police - ten an vil uluk deuh theih nan ngenna thlen ni se tih a ni. Lawngtlai khawpui hmasawnna tura atan a thupek chhuah thin chu chak zawka bawhzui ni se an ti a. DTO lam pawh in 'Motor Registration' ti turte ' garage'an neih leh neih loh te endik bakah Lirthei Document leh License endik leh check kawngah chak zawkin hma lo la se an ti bawk a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian Lawngtlai District Road Safety Committee Member-te leh Sawm bikte an tel kim tha hle a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm a khar a ni.

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT VIGILANCE COMMITTE ON FERTILIZER THUKHAWM
content:
55/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 7th April 2026:Vawiin khan 'Lawngtlai District Vigilance Commitee on Fertilizer' chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihruaiin a Office Chamber-thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kuthnathawk a bik takin Lo/ Huan/Leipui siamtuten tha zawka thlai an thar theih nan lei tha pekchhuah chu thil pawimawh tak a ni, a ti a. A bik takin Kharif Season ( Monsoon) thlai chi thlak a hun leh mai dawna, Lawngtlai District- in a mamawh zat pek theih tura hmalak a nih thu tarlangin, Mizoram sawrkarah pawh mamawh ang ang thleng a nih tawh thu sawiin, amawhphurtute theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a. Ei leh bara Lawngtlai District - in khamkhawp a thar theihna turin Lo/ Huan neitute an pawimawh hle tih sawiin, thahnem ngai taka thawk turin a fuih a ni. District pawn lam atanga thlai thar la lut lo a, mahni intodelh tura tan lak a tul thu tarlangin, thlai chinna hmun tihzau pawh a tul hle tih sawiin, Agriculture leh Horticulture department (Mizoram leh LADC) leh Lo/Leipui neitute theihtawp chhuah turin a chah nghal bawk.

Pu PC Lalchunglura chuan Lei tha lei hralh kawngah fimkhur a ngai a, a mamawhtute tan lei tur a awm reng a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti. Lo neituten khamkhawp an thar bakah mipuite hnena hralh tur an neih theih nan Committee - in theihtawp a chhuah reng thu a sawi a. Thlai thar leh hralh kawngah intodelh turin hmalak chhunzawm zel a ni ang a ti a ni.

Pu Caleb Vanlalrinngama, Member Secretary leh ADAO nibawk chuan Lawngtlai District- a Lei tha mamawh dan tlangpui report pekna a nei a. Tun dinhmunah NPK, Urea, DAP, leh mamawh ang angte state sawrkarah thlen nih tawh thu a sawi a. Fertilizer bikah lo neituten an mamawh ang angte an hmuh theih nan chal zawka hmalak mek a nih thu a tarlang a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian 23 Assam Rifles, Horticulture Department, Agriculture Department aiawh leh Taxation Department (LADC) te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: Mizoram Governor Participates in Census 2027 Self-Enumeration
content:
10/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 7th April, 2026:Mizoram Governor, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), successfully completed his self-enumeration under Phase I of the Census of India 2027 (Houselisting and Housing Census) at Lok Bhavan in Aizawl this morning.

General (Dr) Vijay Kumar described India’s first digital census as a landmark initiative and urged all census officials in Mizoram to make every effort to ensure its smooth and successful implementation across the state. He appealed to the public to take the exercise seriously by registering themselves in the census and to extend full cooperation to the enumerators. He instructed officials to reach even the remotest corners of the state, ensure the process remains as hassle-free as possible for citizens, and conduct the entire exercise in a clear, transparent, and doubt-free manner.

Highlighting the strong Mizo tradition of community support and mutual assistance, the Governor emphasised the importance of close collaboration between census officials and Village Councils or Local Councils to make the fieldwork smoother. He extended his best wishes for the census to be carried out as effectively as possible in Mizoram.

On the occasion, senior officials from the Directorate of Census Operations briefed the Governor on the census preparedness, strategies, and progress in the state. Those present included Mr. Vinod P. Kavle, Director of Census Operations; Mr. Joseph H. Lalramsanga, Municipal Commissioner cum Principal Census Officer; Mrs. Irene Zohlimpuii Chongthu, Additional Secretary, GAD & Additional State Nodal Officer; Mr. Shivam Gupta, Assistant Director of Census Operations; and Mr. Sandip Panja, Assistant Director of Census Operations.

The Census of India 2027 is the country’s first digital census and will be conducted in two phases. The first phase - Houselisting and Housing Census - began on 1 April, 2026. The second phase, Population Enumeration, is scheduled for February 2027. The self-enumeration window is open from 1 April to 15 April, 2026. This will be followed by the House Listing and Housing Census across Mizoram from 16 April to 15 May, 2026.

Attachment

title: Chhiarpui atan Mizoram Larsap inziaklut
content:
54/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 7th April, 2026:Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chu vawiin chawhma khan Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah Chhiarpui, Census of India 2027 Phase-I (Houselisting leh Housing Census) hnuaia self-enumeration-ah hlawhtling takin a inziaklut.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan India rama digital census hmasa ber kalpui chhoh mek a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Mizoramah pawh he hmalakna hi hlawhtling taka neih anih ngei theih nana theihtawp chhuah turin thawktu zawng zawngte a chah a. Mipuite pawh he hmalakna lian tak hi ngaipawimawha, chhiarpuia inziaklut theuh tur leh official-te tha taka tawiawm turin a sawm a. Thingtlang kilkhawr bera chengte thlenga hmaih awm lo tura fimkhur tur leh, mipuite'n harsatna an tawh loh nana a awlsam thei ang bera chhiarpui kalpui turte, hriat thiam loh a awm loh nana tan la sauh sauh turin a fuih bawk.

Larsap chuan Mizo khawtlang nunan midang tanpuina duhna a beh ngheh tlat thu sawiin, chhiarpui buaipuitute chu an hnathawh a lo awlsam zawk theih nan Village Council leh Local Council-te nena thawhdunna ngai pawimawh turin a chah a. Mizoramah chhiarpui tluang leh tha thei ang bera kalpui anih theih nana theihtawp chhuah tura chahin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He hunah hian Directorate of Census Operations official - Pu Vinod P. Kavle, Director of Census Operations, Pu Joseph H. Lalramsanga, Municipal Commissioner cum Principal Census Officer, Pi Irene Zohlimpuii Chongthu, Addl. Secy, GAD & Addl. State Nodal Officer, Pu Shivam Gupta, Asst. Director of Census Operations leh Pu Sandip Panja, Asst. Director of Census Operations te'n Larsap hnenah hian Mizorama census kalpui dan tura ruahmanna an siamte, hmalak tawh dan leh hmachhawpte an hrilh fiah a ni.

Chhiarpui 2027 hi India rama digital census hmasa ber tur niin, thawh hniha kalpui tur a ni a. Thawh khatna Houselisting leh Housing Census hi April 1, 2026 atang khan kalpui tan a lo ni tawh a. Thawh hnihna Population Enumeration hi February 2027-ah neih tan tur a ni a. Self-Enumeration hun hi April 1 atanga April 15, 2026 thleng a ni a, April 16 atanga May 15, 2026 thleng House Listing leh Housing Census Mizoram pumpui-ah kalpui a ni ang.

Attachment

title: Champhai District Consultative Committee, District Level Review Committee leh District Level Security Committee thukhawm
content:
53/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 7th March 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Champhaiah Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hovin October - December 2025 chhunga bank hnathawh dan leh hmalakna hrang hrang endik turin District Consultative Committee, District Level Review Committee leh District Level Security Committee an thukhawm.

Champhai SBI Lead District Manager Pu Lawmkima'n an thutkhawm chhan te sawiin meeting khuhhawnna a nei a, he thukhawmah hian bank an invenhim dan te endik niin Mizoram Rural Bank, Ruantlang Branch chu security guard an neih theih dan ngaihtuah tura hrilh an ni a. CD Ratio zaa sawmruk (60%) pha lo hrang hrang te hnen atangin a chhan zawhfiah a ni a, tihthat nan Financial Literacy Campaign (FLC) neih hnem a tul thu sawi niin bank manager te FLC nei hnem tura chah an ni a, quarter khatah pathum (3) tal nei tura hriattir an ni. Agriculture te, horticulture te, animal husbandry te leh social security hnuaiah te loan pek chhuah zat endik a ni a, bank hrang hrang tihthatna leh hmasawn ngaihna te tarlan a ni. He hunah hian Chairman Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan Potential Linked Credit Plan 2026-27 a tlangzarh bawk a ni.

He hunah hian NABARD leh RBI regional office hotute, Champhai District-a bank hrang hrang branch manager leh line department hotute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: State Election Commission, Mizoram notifies list of documents which can be used as identity instead of EPIC
content:
9/2026-2027

Aizawl, 7th April, 2026 :In exercise of the power conferred under sub-rule (1) of Rule 3 & Rule 56 of The Mara Autonomous District Council, (Election to Village Councils) Rules, 2014 as amended, the State Election Commission, Mizoram has directed that in the case of an elector not yet issued with Elector’s Photo Identity Card (EPIC) or in the case of loss of EPIC, the list of documents which can be used as identity instead of EPIC, needs to be authorized by the Commission in the interest of the electors; –

The electors, in the ensuing By-Election to 6(six) Village Councils under MADC area shall produce, for the purpose of establishing their identity, any one of the following documents before the Presiding Officer or the Polling Officer in the said By-Election:-

LIST OF DOCUMENTS

(i) Elector’s Photo Identity Card(EPIC), issued by ECI,

(ii) Passport/AadharCard

(iii) Driving Licence,

(iv) Income Tax Identity (PAN) Card,

(v) Service Identity Card issued to its employees by State/Central Government, Public Sector Undertakings, Local Bodies or Public Limited Companies,

(vi) Passbooks issued by Public Sector Banks/Post Office and Kisan Passbooks (accounts opened upto February, 2026),

(vii) Property Documents such as Pattas, Registered Deeds, etc.with photograph,

(viii) SC/ST/OBC Certificate and Residential Certificate issued by competent authority (issued upto February, 2026),

(ix) Pension Documents such as ex-servicemen’s Pension Book/Pension Payment Order, ex-servicemen’s Widow / Dependent Certificate, Old Age Pension Order, Widow Pension Order (issued upto February, 2026),

(x) Freedom Fighter Identity Card,

(xi) Arms Licenses (issued upto February, 2026),

(xii) Certificate of Physically Handicapped with photograph issued by the competent authority (issued upto February, 2026),

(xiii) Job Card issued under MNREGA with photograph (issued upto February, 2026),

(xiv) Health Insurance Scheme Smart Card (issued upto February,2026),

(xv) Students Identity Card issued by the concerned Head of Institution.

title: SEC NOTIFIES EXTENSION OF MCC PROVISION FOR VC BYE-ELECTION UNDER MADC
content:
6/2026-2027

Aizawl the 7th April, 2026:In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-rule (1) of Rule 3 of The Mara Autonomous District Council (Election to Village Councils) Rules, 2014, the State Election Commission, Mizoram has notified that the Model Code of Conduct for Political Parties, Candidates and Persons holding public offices has come into force w.e.f. 6th April, 2026 within the areas of the concerned villages under Mara Autonomous District Council wherein Bye-Election to Village Councils is to be held on 30th April, 2026  and the same shall remain in effect till announcement of Results.
